CELTIC SEA.
FRANCE-NORTHWEST COAST.
DNC 08, DNC 19
1. OCEANOGRAPHIC OPERATIONS BY M/V THALASSA:
   A. 060001Z TO 062359Z NOV IN AREA BOUND BY
      47-45.84N 005-54.77W, 47-38.79N 005-37.15W,
      47-30.13N 006-38.06W, 47-48.50N 006-25.55W.
   B. 07001Z TO 072359Z NOV IN AREA BOUND BY
      48-08.61N 007-55.51W, 47-57.53N 007-27.47W,
      47-46.77N 007-30.95W, 48-02.48N 008-06.56W.
   WIDE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 2921/16.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 080059Z NOV 16.
